summary: First-finish smoke tests on ATH ERP. Backend auth, tenant isolation, RBAC, inventory, POS checkout+refund, procurement PO+GRN, finance P&L, dashboard, and AI forecast all verified working. Frontend login and end-to-end POS checkout create a real sale (INV-000298) that appears in the Sales list. One P1 backend bug: /api/ai/nlq returns 500 due to a str.format KeyError in routes_ai.py (SCHEMA_DESCRIPTION contains literal braces).
passed: Tenant isolation: product created in Tenant B (TB-UNIQ-001) not visible from Tenant A (search returns [])
GET /api/inventory/products returns 20 seeded products; alerts returns low_stock/expiring buckets
POST /api/pos/sales (with location_id + line.name/sku) creates sale, invoice_no INV-000297, subtotal 285 + tax 51.3 = total 336.3 (GST 18% correct)
POST /api/pos/sales/{id}/refund returns {ok:true} and sale shows as REFUNDED in UI
POST /api/procurement/pos creates PO (PO-00002, status 'sent'); POST /api/procurement/grn with qty+cost sets status='received'
POST /api/finance/expenses creates expense; GET /api/finance/pnl returns revenue 299083, cogs 228483, gross_profit 70600, tax_collected 53834.94
GET /api/dashboard/summary returns today_revenue, stock_value, sales_trend, low_stock_count etc.
GET /api/ai/forecast returns per-SKU 30-day forecast with reorder_qty
Frontend POS end-to-end: search/add SKU-003+SKU-001 -> checkout -> receipt INV-000298 (₹1,103.30) -> visible in Sales table (200 rows)

failed.issue: POST /api/ai/nlq returns HTTP 500. Traceback: File "/app/backend/routes_ai.py", line 76: `system = SCHEMA_DESCRIPTION.format(tenant_id=ctx.tenant_id)` raises KeyError because SCHEMA_DESCRIPTION contains raw curly braces (e.g. { tenant_id, id, invoice_no ... }) that str.format interprets as placeholders.
failed.evidence: curl -X POST /api/ai/nlq -> 'Internal Server Error'; backend.err.log shows KeyError with the entire braced schema block as key.

action_items: Fix /app/backend/routes_ai.py line ~76: either escape literal braces in SCHEMA_DESCRIPTION ({{ and }}) or use str.replace('{tenant_id}', ctx.tenant_id) instead of .format(). This unblocks the AI NLQ feature.
observations: Seed data shows many products with negative stock (e.g. Basmati Rice stock=-45) and stock_value=-136393. Not a blocker, but indicates seeded sales history exceeds seeded initial stock. May want to seed higher opening stock or GRNs.
POS /api/pos/sales requires location_id and line.name+sku fields; frontend supplies them correctly.
Procurement GRN requires line.cost in addition to qty; not documented in review request but works when included.
